introSection: Bravest Warrior Roller Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster at Xuzhou Paradise in Quanshan, Xuzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is a clone of Blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.
fullText: Bravest Warrior Roller Coaster is a steel launched roller coaster at Xuzhou Paradise in Quanshan, Xuzhou, Jiangsu, China. It is a clone of Blue fire Megacoaster at Europa Park.
